sidebar.headline: What we do
sidebar.description: See how our AI-powered observability platform transforms complexity into your greatest asset.

links.label: Dynatrace Intelligence
links.description: Precise answers, intelligent automation, and AI recommendations.

links.label: AppEngine
links.description: Easily create custom, compliant, data-driven apps.

links.label: Grail
links.description: Store, unify, and contextually analyze all observability, security, and business data.

links.label: Smartscape
links.description: Automatic, real-time topology mapping with context.

links.label: OpenPipeline
links.description: Ingest, process, enrich, contextualize, and persist data from any source at scale.

links.label: OneAgent
links.description: Continuous, automatic discovery & observability across your full stack.

links.label: PurePath
links.description: Distributed tracing and code-level analysis technology.

navigation.headline: Apps, Extensions, and Customization
navigation.description: Explore the Dynatrace Hub to see how we’re open, extensible, and easily integrate with all major cloud platforms and solutions.

sidebar.headline: What we solve
sidebar.description: Learn how Dynatrace enables teams to analyze, automate, and innovate faster.

sidebar.headline: Looking for something?
sidebar.description: See how we empower customer success, and explore our latest eBooks, white papers, blogs, and more.

links.label: Training & Certifications
links.description: Maximize your potential with role-focused Dynatrace training and certification solutions.

links.label: Success & Support
links.description: Continuous, proactive support to accelerate your transformation.

links.label: ACE Services
links.description: Hands-on partnership to drive adoption, automation, and success.

links.label: Dynatrace Developer​
links.description: From beginner to experienced, find everything you need to develop Dynatrace® Apps.

links.label: Partners
links.description: Bringing together industry experts, thought leaders, and hands-on practitioners to create a world class partner network.

links.label: Documentation
links.description: Learn all you need to know about Dynatrace—getting started, how to deploy, monitor and much more.

links.label: Our community
links.description: Dynatrace Community, the biggest and the best place for discussion about AI-powered observability!

links.label: Dynatrace Hub
links.description: All the supported technologies, integrations, and extensions from Dynatrace and our trusted partners.

sidebar.headline: Check us out
sidebar.description: Learn about our mission to advance observability for today’s digital businesses.

navigation.headline: Get to know us
navigation.description: Meet our team, and catch up with our news and announcements.

navigation.headline: We’re global
navigation.description: Explore our commitment to building a more sustainable future worldwide.
